web.title: Sentry incorrectly captures "safe" exceptions raised by Celery tasks
web.description: Sentry captures and logs TaskParseError. If it helps, it appears as if Sentry is capturing the exception as raised during worker execution.

web.title: Celery Error Monitoring | Sentry
web.description: With Celery application monitoring, developers can easily diagnose & optimize their projects while tracking errors. Ger started with Sentry for free here.

web.title: Celery tasks uncaught exceptions not being sent to Sentry
web.description: I'm currently working with Celery tasks in a Django based project. We have raven configured to send all uncaught exceptions and log messages to Sentry.

web.title: Silencing Errors in Production With a Sentry Context Manager
web.description: I liked the idea and tried writing a super simple context manager just for making Celery tasks in my own projects simpler. SentryContextManager.

web.title: Adding Sentry kills Celery worker : r/django - Reddit
web.description: I have just tried to implement Sentry in my django app. I have periodic tasks running and after adding Sentry, these tasks are killed.
